title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an Archon workflow that chains Claude Opus for planning and integration logic with Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design to build frontends. The workflow uses Clerk CLI for authentication and deploys complete applications combining multi-model strengths.
